ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, pure sea salt, no fortification
Mango, flesh without skin, pitted, raw
Lemon, flesh without skin, without seeds, raw
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: 98 % Lachssteak, 2 % Barbecue-Würzung (Gewürze, Meersalz, Mangopulver, Zitronenschale, Rauchsalz (Speisesalz, Rauch), Zucker, Thymian, Paprikagewürzextrakt, Zitronenextrakt).
